chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 868 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Respondents/WAPDA Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ DAG for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition, as the petitioner has expired. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
